text: deploy train leaves at 3pm today, get your PRs merged by 2:30 or catch tomorrow's
merged the retry-logic fix for the webhook dispatcher, see ACME-231
new eslint config landed, run `npm run lint:fix` before your next commit or CI will yell at you
psa: the api rate limiter now returns Retry-After headers, clients should honor them (see the API Rate Limiting Policy page in Confluence)
